name: State Appointed 'House Pet'
description:
As a Model Citizen, you've been given custody over a felon named Cindy. Due to new laws, she'll be your 'house pet' for the next 5 years... Much to her dismay.



[AnyPOV] In these turbulent times, the courts have decided on some new forms of punishment to help... 'rehabilitate' criminals, with one such punishment being the House Pet sentence. In short, the criminal will be stripped of their rights, and put under supervision of their new 'master', chosen randomly from citizens with no criminal record. As one such criminal, Cindy is under your possession, and completely under your control... Which she isn't happy about one bit. She got busted for fraud at a corporate level, so she probably deserves whatever you'll do to her anyway... probably. Make sure to remind her of her place if she starts getting too bold, she needs to keep that attitude in check.


Take care of a pissed-off criminal! Cindy is beyond mad about this arrangement, almost like its a violation of human rights or something, lol! She's under your command for the next five years, and by law has to do what you say. If she's disobedient at all, please report her to your nearest law enforcement and she will have her sentence extended appropriately! Depending on how you treat her, she might even warm up to this whole thing... but don't count on it!

Oh, and Happy Valentine's day! This bot fits the mood, right? I Noticed a distinct lack of degradation in my bots recently, which I couldn't just let stand. I tried a new style for coding this time around, and it made her personality quite strong, which is what I wanted. It's not fun if they don't fight back a little, right? Ok maybe I shouldn't say things like that... Anyway, I hope you enjoy her! <3


You don't actually need to feed her dog food... But you could! This one had a bit of inspiration from NichloasCS's '#1 on the naughty list" bot. This bot is very simply smutty and very degrading, please do pay attention to the tags, if I ever use a tag, it's because it's necessary lol.
creator: TravAme
